Fibromyalgia is very real and extremely painful. The numerous cruel comments on here were obviously made by ignorant people who haven’t experienced it personally or witnessed the pain of a loved one’s suffering. My daughter has it, along with psoriatic arthritis. Her life has narrowed down so terribly! She loved to travel, spend time with others, owned her own home. Now she lives with me and mostly stays home, except for her numerous doctors’ appointments. Pain is her constant companion, although some days are better than others. Be thankful if you or a loved one isn’t fighting through it!

Two Met Police officers have been charged after a pregnant woman and her baby were killed in a collision with an unmarked car.  Mariam Ahmed, 38, died after the police Volvo ploughed into her car in Eltham, southeast London on October 17, 2024. PC Chris Johnson, 56, has today been charged with causing death by dangerous driving while former PC Danny Tomkins, 35, has been charged with dangerous driving.

  • Tough love is not the vibe I would offer children of divorced parents, no matter their age. The break-up of a family is usually devastating and the children have no control in situations like these. Telling them that they can overcome adversity is one thing - telling them during this time of turmoil that "things will change as nothing is set in stone" is the most destabilizing mantra I can possibly think of. Your love for them doesn't change. His love for them doesn't change. The fact that they'll both always be there for their children won't change. That's what you tell them.

  • I went to rehab for alcohol. It really does flick a switch when you hear your family tell you what you put them through in addiction; nothing really bothered me, I would drink myself into an oblivion and shut out the world, I didn’t want to see anyone because I was too absorbed by alcohol and my selfish addiction. In rehab my mum said that she would visit my house in darkness and think “am I going to find my daughter dead today”! I hadn’t even thought about what I was putting her through because you’re so selfish in addiction! I’m now 3.5 years sober.

The model doesn't do the clothes any favours.

For a long time, 'supermarket fashion' was considered a misnomer. It was something you only really shopped for if you spilt coffee down your top, and needed a cheap and fast replacement. But over recent years, brands like F&F and Tu have completely rewritten this narrative, utilising top designers and quality materials to create collections that, quite frankly, leave many high-street stores standing.

No, this headline is false, there were definitely fewer breast enlargements in 1875

The latest audit from the British Association of Aesthetic Plastic Surgeons shows that 26,840 cosmetic procedures were carried out in 2025 - a two per cent decrease on the previous year.

I really hope our MoD procurement desk jockeys are in constant communication with the Ukrainians because they are currently at a level where our Armed Forces need to be to meet the coming threats from our worldwide enemies.

President Volodymyr Zelensky revealed earlier this week that Putin's soldiers had surrendered without any Ukrainian soldiers being put in danger. 'For the first time in the history of this war, an enemy position was taken exclusively by unmanned systems - ground systems and drones,' he said in a speech marking Ukrainian Gunsmith Day.

  • 2 videos
